SEARCH
Module org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject
Package org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database

Class DBConfig

java.lang.Object
org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConfig
public class DBConfig extends Object
Utility class responsible for persisting and loading database configuration. This class stores database credentials in a local properties file to enable automatic reconnection on subsequent application launches. Design Choice: Uses a simple file-based approach for persistence, allowing lightweight configuration management without external dependencies.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Faariz Sheikh
Date:
2026-03-17

  • Field Details

    • CONFIG_FILE

      private static final String CONFIG_FILE
      Path to the properties file used for storing database configuration.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • DBConfig

      private DBConfig()
      Prevent instantiation of utility class.

  • Method Details

    • saveConfig

      public static void saveConfig(String user, String pass, String server, String db)
      Saves database credentials to a local properties file. This allows the application to automatically reconnect using previously stored configuration on future launches.
      Parameters:
      user - database username
      pass - database password
      server - database server address
      db - database name
      Implementation Note:
      Credentials are stored in plain text (not encrypted).

    • loadConfig

      public static Properties loadConfig()
      Loads database configuration from the properties file. If the configuration file does not exist or cannot be read, the method returns null.
      Returns:
      Properties object containing database credentials, or null if configuration is unavailable
